title: Want to Integrate Bank Account for Invoicing
excerpt: I wanted to make an integration of my bank account with [Monday.com] which will extract statement and wanted to match with Invoices for Invoicing purpose. I want to streamline my Invoicing challenges (Like quickbook), bu…

posts.author: HEMAL.SHAH (HEMAL SHAH)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to make an integration of my bank account with [Monday.com] which will extract statement and wanted to match with Invoices for Invoicing purpose. I want to streamline my Invoicing challenges (Like quickbook), but without quickbook.

Is that possible ?

Wanted to know the best practice also for the same.

Your support will be highly appreciated.

Best Regards,
HEMAL SHAH
+919824250007
OPERISOFT

posts.author: ShellyK (Shelly Katzir)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @HEMAL.SHAH, you can use a monday.com marketplace app called Moneylogz to sync your financial transactions and live balances into monday.com boards Hope that helps.

posts.author: LillyBates (Lilly)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey. Anyone found a good workaround using make or zapier to link their bank data for invoicing - maybe pulling in payment confirmations automatically?

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: Basically, you would use Make.com to send an update to Monday.com that the bill has been paid

posts.author: Rosemarys (Rosemarys)
posts.cookedHtml: I ran into something similar and ended up handling invoicing separately from direct bank integration. I synced client and invoice data with a Google Sheet and then tracked payments manually. If you’re still sorting business setup or invoicing legal stuff, Yourcompanyformations.co.uk was useful for me to get my business registered right and understand what info needs to go on invoices. Made it simpler to link everything later.
